description_long: Two adult male figures are depicted in military uniforms, each equipped with tactical gear and accessories. Both individuals wear camouflage-patterned clothing, including jackets, pants, and boots, with one figure donning a helmet and the other showing short hair. Each carries a large, structured backpack and a rifle, with additional pouches and gear strapped across their chests and waists. The uniforms are detailed with visible seams, pockets, and utility straps, and the figures' postures suggest alertness and readiness. The overall appearance is that of modern infantry soldiers prepared for urban or field operations. The asset is highly detailed, with realistic proportions and gear placement.
description: Two adult males in military uniforms with tactical gear, backpacks, and rifles, one wearing a helmet and the other with short hair. Their attire and accessories suggest modern infantry soldiers ready for action.
description_view_0: Side view showing both figures, one with a helmet and the other with short hair, highlighting their tactical vests, backpacks, and rifles.
description_view_1: Rear view emphasizing the large backpacks, gear straps, and the back of the helmeted figure, with both rifles visible.
description_view_2: Front angled view displaying facial features, chest gear, and the helmet on one figure, with both holding rifles.
description_view_3: Rear angled view focusing on the back of the short-haired figure and the side profile of the helmeted figure, with gear and backpacks prominent.
attribute_clothing_type: military uniform with tactical vest, cargo pants, and utility accessories
